headline: NVIDIA Enters Production With Dynamo, the Broadly Adopted Inference Operating System for AI Factories
summary: NVIDIA Dynamo 1.0 NVIDIA Dynamo 1.0, the latest release of NVIDIA Dynamo software, provides a production-grade, open source foundation for inference at scale. News Summary: NVIDIA Dynamo 1.0 provides a production-grade, open source foundation for inference at scale.Dynamo and NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM optimizations integrate natively into open source frameworks such as LangChain, llm-d, LMCache, SGLang and vLLM to boost inference performance.Dynamo boosts inference performance of NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs

headline: Peter Thiel is actively convincing billionaires to abandon The Giving Pledge — and it may be working
summary: In an interview with The New York Times, the PayPal cofounder called it an "Epstein-adjacent Boomer club" — and says he's talked people into quitting.

headline: PayPal’s Collapsing Stock Price Directly Affects PYPY’s Absurd 75% Dividend Yield
summary: A weekly distribution check sounds appealing, but PYPY’s price chart tells a more complicated story. YieldMax PYPL Option Income Strategy ETF (NYSEARCA:PYPY) has shed nearly 22% year-to-date while paying out those distributions, and that gap between income received and capital lost is exactly what income investors need to understand before chasing the yield. headline: Forget the Lawsuit: Here’s How PayPal Could Double From Here
